title: Phase 5: Earnings & RAG Implementation
close_reason: Phase 5 complete: Earnings & RAG implementation with 5 new chat tools

title: Add Earnings Quality component to VeraScore
description: Add Earnings Quality as a scored factor in VeraScore combining quantitative and qualitative signals — but with a clear source distinction. QUANTITATIVE (from FMP earnings data): EPS/revenue beat rate vs analyst estimates, avg surprise %, consistency over rolling quarters. QUALITATIVE (from earnings call transcripts only): management tone/confidence, forward guidance specificity, hedging language frequency, sentiment consistency quarter-over-quarter. Analyst estimates are purely a benchmark for the quant side — tone/qualitative analysis applies only to management statements in transcripts, never analyst commentary. YAML config + scoring engine + UI display.

title: Guidance vs. actuals reconciliation
description: Track and reconcile two distinct types of forward-looking statements: (1) MANAGEMENT GUIDANCE — extracted from earnings call transcripts (prepared remarks section). These are the source of qualitative tone analysis and guidance accuracy scoring. E.g. 'We expect 8-10% revenue growth' → compare to actual next quarter. (2) ANALYST ESTIMATES — from FMP data (epsEstimated, revenueEstimated). Used purely as a quantitative benchmark for beat/miss calculation. Never apply tone or qualitative scoring to analyst estimates. Implementation: use semantic search on prepared_remarks chunks to extract forward-looking statements, store them, then score against subsequent actuals. Guidance accuracy feeds into Earnings Quality factor.

title: Improve system prompt for LLM+RAG knowledge fusion
description: Update SYSTEM_PROMPT in llm.py to explicitly instruct the LLM to synthesize its training knowledge with retrieved RAG chunks. Tell it to use training data for broad context/industry dynamics and RAG results for specific facts/numbers. Distinguish which source is being used in responses.
close_reason: Updated SYSTEM_PROMPT to explicitly leverage both LLM training knowledge and RAG tools. Instructs the model to synthesize broad market context from training with precise current data from tools. Added earnings analysis guidance distinguishing analyst estimates (quant benchmark) from management transcript analysis (qualitative).
